title: Azure DevOps Pipeline Run
description: Schema for an Azure DevOps pipeline run as returned by the Pipelines REST API. A pipeline run represents a single execution of a YAML pipeline, triggered manually or by a CI/CD event. The run tracks state (inProgress, completed), result (succeeded, failed, canceled), timing, and the resources and parameters used.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for this pipeline run. Assigned sequentially within the project.

name.description: Auto-generated run name, typically the build number format defined in the pipeline YAML (e.g., $(Date:yyyyMMdd).$(Rev:r)). Can be overridden by the pipeline's name property.

state.description: Current execution state of the pipeline run.

result.description: Final result of a completed run. Null when the run is not yet completed (state is inProgress or canceling).

createdDate.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the run was created (queued).

finishedDate.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the run finished. Null if the run has not yet completed.

url.description: REST API URL for accessing this run directly.

pipeline.description: Reference to the pipeline definition this run belongs to.

folder.description: Folder path where the pipeline definition is organized.

revision.description: Revision number of the pipeline definition used for this run.

url.description: REST API URL for the pipeline definition.

resources.description: Resources consumed by this pipeline run, such as repository checkout versions and upstream pipeline dependencies.

repositories.description: Repository resources used in this run, keyed by repository alias (e.g., 'self' for the pipeline's own repo).

pipelines.description: Pipeline resources from upstream pipelines used as inputs, keyed by pipeline alias.

builds.description: Build resources used in this run, keyed by resource alias.

variables.description: Variables used in this run. Includes both pipeline-defined variables and any overrides specified when triggering the run. Secret variable values are not returned.

templateParameters.description: Template parameters passed to the YAML pipeline for this run. Parameters are defined with `parameters:` in the pipeline YAML and allow type-safe overrides at queue time.

_links.description: HAL links for related resources (web view, pipeline definition, artifacts).

RepositoryResource.description: A repository resource used in a pipeline run

refName.description: The Git ref (branch or tag) checked out for this run.

version.description: The specific commit SHA checked out for this run.

PipelineResource.description: A pipeline resource from an upstream pipeline run

version.description: Build number of the upstream pipeline run used

value.description: The variable value. Null for secret variables (values are redacted in API responses).

isSecret.description: Whether this variable is marked as secret. Secret variables are not returned in API responses.

href.description: The URL target of the link
